name: Crab-Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 20 large fresh mushrooms, about 1 pound, up to 24
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean mushrooms with damp paper towels. Remove mushroom stems and reserve for use in another recipe.
2. Combine mushroom caps and Italian salad dressing; cover and refrigerate 1-2 hours.
3. Drain well.
4. Combine 1/2 cup of breadcrumbs and remaining ingredients; mix well.
5. Spoon crabmeat mixture into mushroom caps, and sprinkle with the remaining bread crumbs.
6. Place in an 8 inch square baking dish; bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
7. Yield: about 2 dozen appetizer servings.
